page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Pantools is a disk-based java application for computational pan-genomics.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: PanTools is a pangenomic toolkit for comparative analysis of large number of genomes. It is developed in the Bioinformatics Group of Wageningen University, the Netherlands.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PanTools is a pangenomic toolkit for comparative analysis of large number of genomes. It is developed in the Bioinformatics Group of Wageningen University, the Netherlands.
